findings.location: s2 (メールアドレスバリデーション)
findings.description: The source h2 section 'メールアドレスバリデーション' contains well over 2000 characters of plain text and has an h3 subsection 'メールアドレス精査仕様' (underlined with ======). The knowledge file merges both into a single s2 section without splitting at the h3 boundary. Per V3 rules, when a source h2 has ≥2000 chars AND an h3 exists but the knowledge does not split, this should be reported. This also explains the automated warning 'Section count 5 < source headings 7' — the 7 counted headings include 'メールアドレス精査仕様' as a distinct h3.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3: 'メールアドレス精査仕様\n==============================' containing all bullet-point validation rules for the full address, local part, and domain part — a substantial standalone subsection that the knowledge file folds into s2.
